texto: When people really are writers, they write. Artists draw. Golfers golf. Fish swim. Can’t keep them from it; it’s who they are. They may dream of the big time, but in the meantime, they’ll draw or write on napkins if they have to, and every hallway is a fairway. Or a green.Dave Brisbin
explicacao: Orientação direta de David Brisbin sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “When people really are writers, they write. Artists draw. Golfers golf. Fish swim. Can’t keep the…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, creativity, writing, útil em momentos de writing.

frase_original: When people really are writers, they write. Artists draw. Golfers golf. Fish swim. Can’t keep them from it; it’s who they are. They may dream of the big time, but in the meantime, they’ll draw or write on napkins if they have to, and every hallway is a fairway. Or a green.Dave Brisbin
